text:
Created attachment 153614
Update to 9.12

Update Hiawatha to 9.12

http://poudriere.bsdjunk.com/build.html?mastername=10amd64-default&build=2015-02-28_07h37m17s

hiawatha (9.12) stable; urgency=medium •PolarSSL 1.3.9 upgraded to mbed TLS 1.3.10.
•MacOS X PreferencePane removed from MacOS X package.
•Bugfix: memory leak in SSL library.
•Small bugfix.

-- Hugo Leisink <hugo@leisink.net> Thu, 12 Feb 2015 22:39:50 +0100
